LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipHull.label: frozen ship hull
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenShipHull.description: An impassable, indestructible ship hull wall. Capable of holding up a roof.
LanguageData.VQE_FragileFrozenShipHull.label: fragile frozen ship hull
LanguageData.VQE_FragileFrozenShipHull.description: An impassable ship hull wall. The cracks and damage from the crash allow it to be destroyed. Capable of holding up a roof.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock.label: ancient airlock
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock.label: stuck ancient airlock
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock.label: forced ancient airlock
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock.description: A heavily reinforced airlock door. It has been forced open and cannot be closed again.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock_Large.label: ancient large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_AncientAirlock_Large.description: A large, heavily reinforced airlock door. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.label: stuck ancient large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.descripti: A large, heavily reinforced airlock door. Due to malfunction or damage, it needs to be forced open. It is slow to open but very strong. The door requires walls on either side to function.
LanguageData.VQE_JammedAncientAirlock_Large.comps.0.j: Force this ancient large airlock open
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock_Large.label: forced ancient large airlock
LanguageData.VQE_ForcedAncientAirlock_Large.descripti: A heavily reinforced large airlock door. It has been forced open and cannot be closed again.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull1x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull2x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Left.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Left.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Right.label: cryptoship hull
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoshipHull3x1Right.description: A fragment of the exterior hull of the cryptoforge ship.
